summary: Completed testing of Reviews management, Gallery delete button, and Landing page testimonials. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Reviews API: GET /api/reviews returns reviews list (public endpoint)
Reviews API: GET /api/reviews/stats returns rating stats with distribution
Reviews API: POST /api/reviews creates review (admin only)
Reviews API: POST /api/reviews without auth returns 401
Reviews API: PUT /api/reviews/{id} updates review
Reviews API: DELETE /api/reviews/{id} deletes review
Reviews API: DELETE /api/reviews/{id} with invalid id returns 404
Gallery API: GET /api/gallery returns gallery items (public)
Gallery API: DELETE /api/gallery/{id} deletes item (admin only)
Gallery API: DELETE /api/gallery/{id} without auth returns 401
Landing Page: Testimonials section loads with 'What Our Clients Say' heading
Landing Page: Review cards show star rating, review text, reviewer name, and source
Landing Page: 'View All Google Reviews' button opens Google Maps in new tab
Admin Reviews Page: Loads with data-testid='admin-reviews'
Admin Reviews Page: Shows 'Reviews & Contact' heading
Admin Reviews Page: Average Rating card displays correctly (4.8 rating)
Admin Reviews Page: Rating Distribution bar chart shows 5-star to 1-star breakdown
Admin Reviews Page: 'Add Review' button opens modal
Admin Reviews Page: Add Review modal has name, date, rating stars, source dropdown, review text fields
Admin Reviews Page: Source dropdown uses native HTML select (not Shadcn)
Admin Reviews Page: Can successfully add a new review
Admin Reviews Page: Reviews list shows all reviews with edit/delete buttons
Admin Reviews Page: 'Google Reviews' button uses window.open and opens in new tab
Admin Reviews Page: Contact & Social section shows WhatsApp, Instagram, Email, Phone
Gallery Page: Delete button always visible (not hover-only)
Gallery Page: Delete button positioned correctly (absolute top-3 right-3)
Gallery Page: Delete button is clickable and functional
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_Playwright_User review during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) Gallery delete button is always visible (not hover-only) with correct positioning (absolute top-3 right-3). 2) Admin Reviews page has rating distribution bar chart, average rating card, add/edit/delete review functionality. 3) Add Review modal uses native HTML select for source dropdown (not Shadcn). 4) Google Reviews button uses window.open() to open in new tab (not blocked). 5) Landing page shows dynamic testimonials fetched from /api/reviews API with star ratings, review text, reviewer name, and source. 6) All Reviews API endpoints working correctly (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, stats).
